name: io.github.feedoracle/feedoracle-mcp
description: Compliance evidence infrastructure for regulated tokenized markets. 27 MCP tools covering MiCA preflight (PASS/WARN/BLOCK), peg monitoring, reserve quality, custody risk, KYA agent identity, tamper-proof audit trail, and signed PDF reports. Every response ES256K-signed and blockchain-anchored. Part of a 53-tool ecosystem across 3 servers. MiCA enforcement July 2026.
